Petition To Remove Trustee Marwan Hannon And For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Remove Trustee Marwan Hannon And For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-18-2013 Continued To Jan-21-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee Marwan Hannon And For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-20-2013 Continued To Dec-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen McDonagh for Jason Denekamp.

Mr. McDonagh stated that Mr. Shustoff will not appear and that he is also requesting a continuance on his behalf as well. The Petition to Remove Trustee, etc. was continued to December 18, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to obtain a declination from the named Successor Trustee (Mr. Hampton), a consent to serve from Mr. Hong and an order appointing Mr. Hong.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition To Remove Trustee Marwan Hannon And For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-23-2013 Continued To Nov-20-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen McDonagh for Jason Denekamp. Mark Shustoff for Marwan Hannon.

Mr. Shustoff stated that his Client offered to resign and do an accounting for the period of January 1, 2013 through October 31, 2013. Mr. McDonagh stated that he agrees to what was stated. The Court informed Counsel that a consent to act is needed from the Successor Trustee. Counsel stated that the issue of turning over assets can be worked out amongst themselves. The Petition to Remove Trustee and for Appointment of Successor Trustee was continued to November 20, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition To Remove Trustee Marwan Hannon And For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-09-2013 Continued To Oct-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Shustoff for Marwan Hannon.

Mr. Shustoff stated that he had not heard from Mr. McDonagh, that the last time he heard from him was when the matter was on calendar for September 18, 2013, and that he told Mr. McDonagh that his Client was willing to step, do an accounting and accept the new Trustee. Mr. Shustoff also stated that they have not done the accounting and that at this point he is not sure that his Client is willing to step down. The Petition to Remove Trustee, etc. was continued to October 23, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Shustoff and the Court will notify Mr. McDonagh of the hearing date.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition To Remove Trustee Marwan Hannon And For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Continued To Oct-09-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
